title: Porypal (GBA Toolchain)
description: Full-stack local web app for extracting and processing Game Boy Advance compatible sprites and palettes for Pokémon ROM hacks.
markdown:
## What
Porypal is a sprite and palette toolchain for Pokémon Gen 3 ROM hacking, targeting developers working on decompilation projects like pokeemerald and pokefirered.

## How
- Local web app written in React/Vite (frontend) and FastAPI (backend)
- Perceptual color quantization in Oklab space using pure numpy k-means, no ML dependencies
- Resource browser/search engine that indexes decomp project folders (thousands of sprites and palettes) with lazy-loading and wildcard filtering
- Group extraction for index-aligned palettes across sprite variants, shiny palette pair matching, tile arranger with reusable presets

## Result
Widely adopted by the ROM hacking community for processing and inserting sprites across full decomp projects. Ships as a self-contained local web app, one script to run, no configuration.

### AI Usage (Collaboration)
v1 was fully AI-generated as a proof of concept. v2 shipped a usable tool suite to the community. v3 rebuilt the entire UI from scratch with a proper full-stack architecture and expanded capabilities. AI assisted with frontend components and some backend scaffolding. Core domain logic, GBA constraint handling, palette alignment algorithms, and pipeline design were written manually.
